macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Week Ahead: U.S. Inflation Data and Trump's China Visit in Focus for FX and Bonds
items.summary: U.S. inflation data is the week's highlight amid resilient economy signals from strong nonfarm payrolls, with markets pricing low odds of rate cuts; President Trump's visit to China for summit with Xi Jinping draws attention to trade, AI, and Middle East tensions driving higher gasoline prices.

items.title: U.S. Consumer Sentiment Hits 74-Year Low Amid Wage Squeeze and High Inflation
items.summary: University of Michigan's final April consumer sentiment reading fell to 49.8, the lowest in survey history, as inflation nears 4% fueled by $4.55/gallon gas from U.S.-Israeli war in Iran, while wage growth slowed to 3.6% YoY despite April's 115K job gains and steady 4.3% unemployment.

items.title: Nasdaq Leads Risk Appetite Rally Despite Inflation, Labor Data, and US-Iran Headlines
items.summary: Nasdaq surged amid strong risk appetite, shrugging off abundant headlines on US-Iran negotiations, inflation threats, labor market data concerns, and monetary policy; equity openings highlighted AMD data center beat, Novo Nordisk Wegovy sales, Samsung $1T milestone, SMCI guidance, Google-Anthropic $200B deal.

items.title: ECB Rate Decision Expected 50bps Hike; Key U.S. Data Includes PMI, ISM Manufacturing
items.summary: ECB anticipated to hike rates by 50bps with press conference; U.S. events feature S&P PMI Final at 52.4, ISM Manufacturing at 49.8, average hourly earnings 0.4% M/M; EU PPI beat expectations at 3.4% MoM and 2.1% YoY.

items.title: Lavrov and Rubio Discuss Russia-U.S. Relations and Bilateral Contacts
items.summary: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov and U.S. Senator Rubio discussed international agenda, Russia-U.S. relations, and schedule of bilateral contacts, per Russian reports.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Sees $100M in Liquidations Over 24 Hours
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market experienced $100 million in liquidations, with short positions hit hardest at $65.55 million compared to $34.62 million for longs. Bitcoin and Ethereum saw $20.39 million and $14.89 million in liquidations respectively, affecting 62,490 traders.

items.title: Crypto Market Cap Reaches $2.68 Trillion with Notable Altcoin Gains
items.summary: The total cryptocurrency market capitalization hit $2.68 trillion, showing 1.39% growth. Top gainers include Black Phoenix (BPX) up 1929.95%, Gold Pump Meme (GPM) up 1674.08%, and Netflix tokenized stock (NFLXX) up 792.72%.

items.title: Solana Breaks $90 Resistance, Triggers $21M in Short Liquidations
items.summary: Solana (SOL) surged past the $90 resistance level, causing over $21 million in short liquidations and attracting the highest ETF inflows since January. Technical indicators suggest potential resistance levels at $110 and $120.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds $80K While Altcoins Surge on DeFi Activity
items.summary: Bitcoin remained stable at $80,900 (up 0.66%) and Ethereum at $2,327.69 (up 0.65%), while altcoins outperformed with Uniswap (+13.57%), Terra Luna Classic (+12.45%), and SUI (+8.84%) leading gains driven by DeFi activity.

items.title: Payward Files OCC Application for Federally Regulated Crypto Custody Service
items.summary: Payward, parent company of crypto exchange Kraken, submitted an OCC filing to develop Payward National Trust Company (PNTC) to provide federally regulated custody services for digital assets.

items.title: Top Altcoins Show Explosive Growth; Solayer Leads with 55.8% Gain
items.summary: According to CoinGecko data, Solayer (LAYER) recorded a 55.8% increase in 24 hours, while TROLL gained 76.4%, and Billions Network (BILL) rose 17.6%, reflecting strong altcoin momentum.

items.title: Ethereum Whales Show $41.94M in Net Buying Pressure
items.summary: Ethereum whales demonstrated significant buying interest with $41.94 million in net buying pressure over 24 hours, with total ETH trading volume reaching $1.104 billion and buy orders outpacing sells.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Higher Education Faces Uncertainty After Canvas LMS Hack
items.summary: Thousands of schools nationwide are dealing with disruptions after the popular learning management system Canvas was hacked on Friday, leaving faculty and students uncertain about academic continuity.

items.title: Cloudflare Launches Workers AI with Free Unlimited API Keys for 100+ Models
items.summary: Cloudflare's new Workers AI platform offers free, unlimited API access to over 100 AI models including Claude, GPT, and Qwen via playground.ai.cloudflare.com, enabling easy testing and development.

items.title: Claude AI Gains New Capabilities for Programmatic Video and Image Generation
items.summary: An update to Claude integrates it with Higgsfield MCP endpoints, allowing advanced programmatic generation of videos, images, and audio directly through code.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: NC America Announces AION 2 Global Release
items.summary: NC America has made significant news regarding the global release of AION 2, as covered in a recent YouTube video highlighting updates and developments.

items.title: Pros Discover Best New Tactics in FC 26 After Latest Patch
items.summary: Top players have found the most effective 4-2-3-1 tactics in FC 26 following a recent patch, making it unstoppable in FUT Champs and Elite Division.

items.title: Emergency Update to Best Deck in Standard for Magic: The Gathering
items.summary: A new update reveals optimal land counts (18, 22, 26) for the top Standard deck using Strixhaven cards, dominating top 100 Mythic rankings.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Panthalassa Nets $140M Led by Peter Thiel for Wave-Powered Sea Data Centers
items.summary: Panthalassa secured $140 million in funding led by Peter Thiel to develop wave-powered data centers at sea for AI computing needs.

items.title: Microsoft’s New Xbox Chief Cancels Gaming Copilot for Mobile and Console
items.summary: New Xbox CEO Asha Sharma is shutting down Gaming Copilot on mobile and canceling its console version, just a year after launch, amid leadership changes.

items.title: Nintendo Raises Switch 2 Prices Amid Chip Crisis
items.summary: Nintendo is increasing prices for the Switch 2 as a chip shortage impacts production; the console sold 19.86 million units last year but expects a sales drop next year.

items.title: GM Settles California Lawsuit for $12.75M Over Misuse of Customer Driving Data
items.summary: General Motors agreed to pay $12.75 million to resolve a lawsuit alleging it collected and sold customer driving data from OnStar to data brokers.

items.title: Intel Signs Preliminary Deal to Produce Chips for Apple
items.summary: Intel has reportedly reached a preliminary agreement to manufacture chips for Apple, echoing their past partnership.

items.title: Sony Partners with TSMC for New Image Sensor Production Facility
items.summary: Sony is collaborating with TSMC to build a new facility dedicated to producing advanced image sensors.

items.title: US Allows Critical Updates for Banned Drones and Routers Until 2029
items.summary: The FCC will permit software and firmware updates for certain banned Chinese drones and routers until January 2029.
